document_info.document_type: Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage A — Coverage for Loss to the Undamaged Portion of the Building: When a Covered Cause of Loss occurs to the building, the Company will pay for loss in value of the undamaged portion of the building as a consequence of enforcement of any ordinance or law that requires demolition, in whole or in part, of any property that is damaged. Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12 effective 2026-03-15.

The Company will pay for direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an Equipment Breakdown accident to an object described in the Schedule, including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment. Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12 effective 2026-03-15.

The Company will pay for direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by the interruption of utility services to the described premises, including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services. Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12 effective 2026-03-15.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas
